title: Murder to Mercy: The Cyntoia Brown Story
original_title: Murder to Mercy: The Cyntoia Brown Story
overview: After 16-year-old Cyntoia Brown is sentenced to life in prison, questions about her past, physiology and the law itself call her guilt into question.
